questions.question: What is the specific name of the property you search for to connect Google Drive files to a database?

options.text: Google Drive Link
options.explanation: Google Drive Link is not the property name. The correct search term is 'Google Drive File'.

options.text: Google Drive File
options.explanation: The documentation explicitly states to search for and click 'Google Drive File'.

options.text: Drive Connection
options.explanation: Drive Connection is not a valid search term in the Notion Help Center instructions.

options.text: Google Documents
options.explanation: Google Documents refers to Docs, not the specific file property integration.

questions.question: What is the primary purpose of connected properties in Notion?

options.text: To export database data to external applications like Excel
options.explanation: Connected properties are used to *import* data from external apps into the database, not export.

options.text: To bring data from Google Drive, Figma, and more right into your databases
options.explanation: The introduction to the article states that connected properties allow you to bring data from Google Drive, Figma, and more into databases.

options.text: To link two separate Notion databases together
options.explanation: While databases can be linked to each other, connected properties specifically refer to integrating third-party services.

options.text: To create new pages inside the database
options.explanation: Creating pages is a separate function; connected properties focus on integrating external file data.

questions.question: Which plan tiers are required to use Figma connected properties?

options.text: Free and Plus
options.explanation: Figma connected properties are not available on Free or Plus plans.

options.text: Business and Enterprise
options.explanation: The article specifies that Figma connected properties are only available on Business and Enterprise Plans.

options.text: Enterprise and Education
options.explanation: While Enterprise is listed, Education is not mentioned as a valid plan for this feature.

options.text: Plus and Business
options.explanation: Plus is not listed for Figma; it is listed for Google Drive but not for Figma.

questions.question: When adding a Zendesk connected property, which exact property name must be searched for?

options.text: Zendesk Ticket ID
options.explanation: The property name is 'Zendesk Ticket', not 'Zendesk Ticket ID'.

options.text: Zendesk Ticket
options.explanation: The steps instruct you to search for and click 'Zendesk Ticket'.

options.text: Support Ticket
options.explanation: Support Ticket is not the specific search term provided for Zendesk.

options.text: Zendesk Connect
options.explanation: Zendesk Connect is not the property name used in the Notion Help Center instructions.

questions.question: What happens to the Unique ID property when you add a GitHub Pull Request connected property to a database?

options.text: It is deleted automatically
options.explanation: The Unique ID property is not deleted; it is managed or added as needed.

options.text: It is added to the database if it doesn’t already have one
options.explanation: The documentation states that the Unique ID property will be added to your database if it doesn’t already have one.

options.text: It requires manual setup by the user
options.explanation: The property is handled automatically by Notion; no manual setup is required for the property itself.

options.text: It is hidden from the database view
options.explanation: The property is not hidden; it is integrated into the database structure.

questions.question: How can you connect a GitHub Pull Request to a database if you do not have the Unique ID of the Notion task?

options.text: You must always use the Unique ID and cannot use the URL
options.explanation: You are not limited to the Unique ID; you can also paste the GitHub pull request URL.

options.text: Paste the GitHub pull request URL into the property
options.explanation: The documentation states you can either add the Unique ID of the Notion task or paste the GitHub pull request URL.

options.text: Connect via the GitHub API only
options.explanation: The instructions allow for direct URL pasting or Unique ID usage, not just API connection.

options.text: Use the issue number instead of the pull request URL
options.explanation: The instructions specifically mention using the URL or the Unique ID, not the issue number.

questions.question: Which step in the Google Drive connection process involves authenticating with the external service?

options.text: Clicking on an empty cell
options.explanation: Clicking on an empty cell prepares the cell but does not involve authentication.

options.text: Searching for and clicking Google Drive File
options.explanation: Searching for the property name adds the property type but does not trigger the auth flow.

options.text: Go through the authentication flow
options.explanation: The authentication flow occurs when you click 'Connect to Google Drive' and are redirected to authenticate.

options.text: Paste a Google Drive file link into the cell
options.explanation: Pasting a link is the final step after authentication has been completed.

questions.question: To add a Figma file to a Figma connected property, what action must be taken?

options.text: Click on an empty cell and choose a file from your Drive
options.explanation: Figma connected properties do not allow selecting files from your drive via the cell; you must paste a link.

options.text: Paste a Figma link into the cell to connect it
options.explanation: The instructions explicitly state to 'Paste a Figma link into the cell to connect it'.

options.text: Upload the file directly to the Notion page
options.explanation: You cannot upload the file directly; you must paste a link to an existing Figma file.

options.text: Drag and drop the Figma file URL into the cell
options.explanation: While pasting is mentioned, the specific instruction is to paste a Figma link, not drag and drop a URL.

questions.question: Are connected properties available to all Notion users regardless of their plan?

options.text: Yes, all plans have access to connected properties
options.explanation: Access is restricted; for example, Google Drive connected properties require Plus, Business, or Enterprise.

options.text: No, they are restricted to Plus, Business, and Enterprise plans
options.explanation: Google Drive requires Plus, Business, and Enterprise. Figma and Zendesk require Business and Enterprise, confirming the restriction.

options.text: Only the Enterprise plan has access
options.explanation: Plus and Business plans do have access to specific connected properties like Google Drive.

options.text: Yes, but only for Google Drive integration
options.explanation: Connected properties are available for Google Drive, Figma, Zendesk, and GitHub.

questions.question: Before using the GitHub Pull Request property, what must be ensured regarding your GitHub account?

options.text: You must have a GitHub Pro account
options.explanation: The article does not specify a paid tier for GitHub, only that you must have connected your account.

options.text: You must have connected your GitHub account with Notion
options.explanation: The steps state: 'make sure you’ve connected your GitHub account with Notion'.

options.text: You must verify your email address
options.explanation: While verification is standard, the specific requirement mentioned for GitHub is connecting the account with Notion.

options.text: You must create a new GitHub Personal Access Token
options.explanation: The instructions refer to connecting the account generally, not specifically creating a token.
